name: Phase 3 P2 Investigation - Restart Consumer (v3 correct config)
description: Restart Consumer with backends in kv_connector_extra_config

tasks.name: Start Consumer
commands: cd /home/ubuntu && FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_HOST=172.31.2.221 VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_PORT=50100 NIXL_LOG_LEVEL=TRACE nohup python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct --port 8200 --tensor-parallel-size 2 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 --max-model-len 32000 --max-num-batched-tokens 8192 '--kv-transfer-config' '{"kv_connector":"NixlConnector","kv_role":"kv_consumer","kv_rank":0,"kv_parallel_size":1,"kv_buffer_device":"cpu","kv_buffer_size":5000000000,"kv_ip":"172.31.2.221","kv_port":14579,"kv_connector_extra_config":{"backends":["LIBFABRIC"]}}' > /home/ubuntu/consumer_p2.log 2>&1 & echo "[OK] Consumer started with PID: $!"; sleep 10

tasks.name: Verify Startup
commands: pgrep -f 'vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server' && echo '[OK] Process running' || echo '[ERROR] Process not running'
